description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsBrown brassiere, non wired, high coverage, moulded, soft fabric, detachable straps and comes with brown and transparent straps, rosebud bow detail in between the cups, smooth and padded cups which makes it wearable under tight fitting garments and double adjustable hook and eye clasp at the backMaterial and Care91% nylon and 9% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
